title: Brother Anna
writer: Grigoris Grigoriou, Panos Kontellis, John Norman
actors: Petros Fyssoun, Byron Pallis, Mitsos Ligizos
plot: A precious Byzantine cross hidden in Mount Athos becomes a pole of attraction for an ambitious art-thief and his team; but, a young woman is on to them. Can Brother Anna help him repent before the ancient relic falls into the wron...
